deferred_parser_targets.detail: full parser-surface emission is deferred for tree_sitter_c_json: the current stable shortlist only proves load and prepare for this larger external parser-only target
deferred_parser_targets.notes: real external parser-only grammar snapshot from the local tree-sitter-c repo, added in M33 as a deferred parser-boundary target because the current stable shortlist does not yet prove the full emitted and compiled surface for grammars of this size

deferred_control_targets.notes: intentionally ambiguous parser-only control fixture kept deferred to preserve a known shift/reduce boundary without precedence annotations
